title: Detection of Lemon Leaf Diseases Using Inception V3-Based Machine Learning Model
abstract: A comparative deep-learning study of lemon leaf disease classification in which Inception V3 achieved 86.94% validation accuracy, with explainability and augmentation identified as paths toward stronger precision-agriculture systems.
venue: International Conference on Computational Intelligence and Information Retrieval (ICCIIR 2025) · LNNS 1617
